name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.5 endpoint-bridge metric coordinate-flow qualification v1
purpose: Repair the D0.4 collapsed-endpoint velocity conflict by supervising a translation-quotient endpoint residual and sampling with its exact bounded bridge contraction. Test only the same fixed 64 single-endpoint sources.

parent_evidence.gate_p5_d0_4_fixed_source_full_trajector: failed; raw velocity at a collapsed endpoint is source-ambiguous and the fixed-source 33-time trajectory did not meet the frozen criteria

literature_basis.citation: Lipman et al., Flow Matching for Generative Modeling, 2023
literature_basis.use: Probability-path choice determines the marginal vector field; raw conditional velocities need not remain identifiable after path collapse.

literature_basis.citation: Tong et al., Improving and generalizing flow-based generative models with minibatch optimal transport, 2023
literature_basis.use: Coupling/path construction is a modeling decision, not merely a network-capacity detail.

literature_basis.citation: Albergo, Boffi, and Vanden-Eijnden, Stochastic Interpolants, 2023
literature_basis.use: Interpolant parameterization can be changed while preserving endpoint distributions; D0.5 uses a deterministic endpoint-residual bridge.

literature_basis.citation: Song, Meng, and Ermon, Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models, 2021
literature_basis.use: Endpoint/x0 prediction supports a bounded deterministic update rather than raw terminal velocity regression.

state.target_parameterization: r_t=P Log_{x_t}(x_1); it is exactly zero for every source at the collapsed endpoint

architecture.coordinate_decoder: equivariant vector-message output plus metric edge-displacement residual head sum_j alpha_ij(x,t) delta_r_ij

time_sampling.distribution: independent Uniform[0,1] per fixed source per optimizer step

evaluation.teacher_forced_metric: Predict endpoint by x_t plus model residual, then independently align one common fractional translation per graph and mean-reduce all source/time pairs.

decision_rule: A pass permits only a separately versioned unseen-source test of this exact bridge. A failure ends this line: report whether residual fitting or bridge integration failed, without increasing steps, capacity, or searching loss/schedule settings. Do not start P5-D1, harmonic, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT work.
